title: MessagePack Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for MessagePack CLI commands and code syntax.

commands.description: Serialize a Python object to MessagePack format
commands.scenario: Serialize a Python object to MessagePack format

commands.description: Deserialize MessagePack data to a Python object
commands.scenario: Deserialize MessagePack data to a Python object

commands.command:
const msgpack = require('msgpack-lite');
const buffer = msgpack.encode({ key: 'value' });
commands.description: Encode a JavaScript object to MessagePack format
commands.scenario: Encode a JavaScript object to MessagePack format

commands.description: Decode MessagePack data to a JavaScript object
commands.scenario: Decode MessagePack data to a JavaScript object

commands.command:
const codec = msgpack.createCodec({binarraybuffer: true});
const buffer = msgpack.encode({key: 'value'}, {codec});
